data.name: numericUpDownWidth.ToolTip
data.value: Width of the saved corrected image, in pixels (1-4096). Larger = finer sampling and bigger file. Linked to Height when Keep Aspect Ratio is on.

data.name: numericUpDownHeight.ToolTip
data.value: Height of the saved corrected image, in pixels (1-4096). Larger = finer sampling and bigger file. Linked to Width when Keep Aspect Ratio is on.

data.name: checkBoxKeepAspect.ToolTip
data.value: Lock Width and Height together so the saved image stays square; editing one copies its value to the other.

data.name: numericUpDownResolution.ToolTip
data.value: Pixel size of the saved corrected image, in micrometres per pixel (1-1000 um/px). Smaller value = finer detail. Stored internally as mm/pixel (value/1000).

data.name: numericUpDownCenterX.ToolTip
data.value: X position of the beam center (direct-beam spot) in the saved corrected image, in pixels (-4096 to 4096). Defines where the ring pattern is centered.

data.name: numericUpDownCenterY.ToolTip
data.value: Y position of the beam center (direct-beam spot) in the saved corrected image, in pixels (-4096 to 4096). Defines where the ring pattern is centered.

data.name: buttonOK.ToolTip
data.value: Save the geometry-corrected image to an .ipa file using the width, height, resolution and center set above (includes camera length and wavelength).

data.name: buttonCancel.ToolTip
data.value: Close this dialog without saving any image.

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Output image dimensions in pixels. Width and Height of the saved corrected image (1-4096 each).

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Width of the saved corrected image, in pixels (1-4096).

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Height of the saved corrected image, in pixels (1-4096).

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Beam center (direct-beam spot) position in the saved corrected image, in pixels. Sets where the diffraction rings are centered.

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: X position of the beam center in the saved image, in pixels.

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Y position of the beam center in the saved image, in pixels.

data.name: label3.ToolTip
data.value: Pixel size of the saved corrected image, in micrometres per pixel. Smaller = finer detail.

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Unit for Resolution: micrometres per pixel (um/px). Smaller value = finer pixels.
